chunks.text: Modeling Field Enhancement in an RF Gap (M00/22) by E. Kawamura, J.P. Verboncoeur and Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall. Physical and Numerical Methods of Speeding Up Particle Codes and Paralleling as Applied to RF Discharges (M99/58) by E. Kawamura, Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall and V. Vahedi. Ion Energy Distributions in RF Sheaths; Review, Analysis and Simulation (M98/62) by E. Kawamura, V. Vahedi, Michael A. Lieberman and Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall. Plasmas at the Edge, Part I (M98/31) by D.J. Cooperberg and Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall. Multipactor Electron Discharge Physics Using an Improved Secondary Emission Model (M97/24) by V.P. Gopinath, J.P. Verboncoeur and Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall.

Plasma Computer Experiments Laboratory (M96/86) by Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall, V.P. Gopinath and J.P. Verboncoeur. Bounded Plasma Edge Physics as Observed from Simulations in 1D and 2D (M96/85) by D. Cooperberg, K. Cartwright and Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall. Similarity of Limiting Currents in Planar and Cylindrical Crossed-Field Diodes (M95/56) by V.P. Gopinath, J.P. Verboncoeur and Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall. Rapid Current Transition in a Crossed-Field Diode (M95/55) by J.P. Verboncoeur and Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall. Review of Ion Energy Distributions in Capacitively Coupled RF Plasma Reactors (M95/49) by E. Kawamura, V. Vahedi, Michael A. Lieberman and Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall.

Simulations of Limiting Current in a Crossed-Field Gap: Hull Diode (M93/86) by J. Verboncoeur and Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall. Theory and Simulation of Plasma Sheath Waves (M92/148) by X.Q. Xu, G. DiPeso, V. Vahedi and Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall. Verification of Frequency Scaling Laws for Capacitive RF Discharges Using Two-Dimensional Simulations (M92/146) by V. Vahedi, Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall, Michael A. Lieberman, G. DiPeso and T.D. Rognlien. Evidence of Stochastic Diffusion Across a Cross-Field Sheath Due to Kelvin-Helmholtz Vortices (M91/79) by S.E. Parker, X.Q. Xu, Allan J. Lichtenberg and Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall. A One Dimensional Collisional Model for Plasma Immersion Ion Implantation (M90/60) by V. Vahedi, Michael A. Lieberman, M.V. Alves, J.P. Verboncoeur and Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall.

Sheath Voltage Ratio for Asymmetric RF Discharges (M90/56) by M.V. Alves, Michael A. Lieberman, V. Vahedi and Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall. Numerical Error in Electron Orbits with Large omega_cc Delta t (M89/136) by S.E. Parker and Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall. Traveling-Wave-Tube Simulation; The IBC Code (M89/116) by I. Morey and Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall. Vortex Formation and Particle Transport in a Cross-Field Plasma Sheet (M88/53) by K. Theilhaber and Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall. Collector and Source Sheaths of a Finite Ion Temperature Plasma (M88/23) by L.A. Schwager and Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall.

A Relativistic Monte Carlo Binary Collision Model for Use in Plasma Particle Simulation Codes (M87/24) by R.J. Procassini, Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall, Edward Morse and B.I. Cohen. Vortex Dynamics and Transport to the Wall in a Crossed-Field Plasma Sheath (M87/18) by K. Theilhaber and Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall. Simulation of Plasma Dynamics Using Many Particles (M86/47) by Charles K. (Ned) Birdsall, N.F. Otani and B.I. Cohen.
